nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill guide covering Rust testing patterns including TDD workflow, unit/integration/async tests, property-based testing with proptest, mocking with mockall, doc tests, benchmarking with Criterion, and CI integration.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for a safety guard that prevents destructive operations, offering Careful, Freeze, and Guard modes with unlock capability to protect files and directories during development.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for the Santa Method quality-assurance workflow: a multi-phase generate-review-gate-fix loop using dual independent reviewers, configurable rubrics, and subagent parallelism to enforce high-quality outputs.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for searching the PubMed biomedical literature database, covering query construction, MeSH terms, filters, and the NCBI E-utilities API workflow with output discipline and review checklists.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for querying the USPTO patent and trademark databases, covering PatentSearch, TSDR, file wrapper workflows, authentication, and reproducible output formatting.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for using the gget bioinformatics Python package to query genomic databases (Ensembl, NCBI, UniProt), with installation patterns, common modules, and reproducibility logging.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for conducting systematic scientific literature reviews, providing an 8-step workflow from question definition through synthesis and citation verification, with output templates.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for rigorously evaluating academic papers across 9 rubric dimensions (methodology, evidence, analysis, limitations, etc.) with a structured review process and output template.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill that enforces researching existing solutions before coding, providing a decision matrix, quick and full search modes, and integration points with planning and architecture agents.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for systematic security vulnerability hunting, defining in-scope patterns, triage loop workflow, and structured report format with quality gate requirements.

nodes.name: cloud-infrastructure-security.md
nodes.summary: Supplementary reference document for cloud and infrastructure security, providing detailed checklists covering IAM, secrets management, network security, logging, CI/CD pipeline security, Cloudflare/CDN hardening, and backup/disaster recovery.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive security review skill covering 10 security categories (secrets, input validation, SQL injection, auth, XSS, CSRF, rate limiting, data exposure, Solana blockchain, dependencies) with code examples, verification steps, and a pre-deployment checklist.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for running automated security scans, covering basic scan, output formats, auto-fix, deep analysis mode, GitHub Actions integration, and severity level interpretation.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for applying SEO best practices, covering technical SEO checklists (crawlability, indexability, performance, structured data), on-page rules, keyword mapping, internal linking, and audit output format.

nodes.name: compliant_trace.jsonl
nodes.summary: Fixture file containing a compliant agent trace in JSONL format used as test data for the skill-comply compliance measurement tool.

nodes.name: noncompliant_trace.jsonl
nodes.summary: Fixture file containing a noncompliant agent trace in JSONL format used as negative test data for the skill-comply compliance measurement tool.

nodes.name: tdd_spec.yaml
nodes.summary: YAML specification fixture defining TDD workflow compliance rules with step definitions and scoring criteria, used as a sample skill spec for testing the skill-comply evaluation framework.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Python project configuration for the skill-comply package, specifying project metadata, pytest options, and test dependency groups.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty Python package initializer making the scripts directory a proper Python package for the skill-comply tool.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill definition for skill-comply, an automated compliance measurement tool that evaluates agent trace JSONL files against YAML skill specs, emphasizing prompt-independent scoring.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for discovering and vetting existing skills before implementing new ones, providing a 6-step workflow covering local search, remote source lookup, external vetting, and ranked decision options.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for auditing and evaluating the full set of installed skills in a project, offering quick-scan and full-stocktake modes with multi-phase inventory, quality evaluation, summary table, and consolidation output.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill for ranking and scoring social graph nodes (followers, following lists) using multi-signal scoring including engagement, authority, and recency, with a defined input/output schema.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide (SocialClaw) for cross-platform social media publishing, covering account setup, media upload, schedule.json construction, validation, publish, and monitor workflow across multiple providers.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Reference skill covering Spring Boot development patterns including REST API structure, JPA repository pattern, service layer transactions, DTOs, exception handling, caching, async processing, middleware filters, pagination, rate limiting, and observability.
